Video.summary: As McCall rekindles an old romance, Hunter insinuates himself into a case involving a mysterious theft.
Video.title: Street Wise, Part 1

Video.summary: An investigation leads Hunter to the killer of a fellow officer while McCall weighs the decision to marry.
Video.title: Street Wise, Part 2

Video.summary: Hunter teams with two Metro officers to locate the missing profits of a murdered black-marketeer.
Video.title: Deadly Encounters, Part 1

Video.summary: Hunter teams with two Metro officers to locate the missing profits of a murdered black-marketeer.
Video.title: Deadly Encounters, Part 2

Video.summary: Hunter attempts to clear the name of a fellow detective accused of a lucrative scheme.
Video.title: Where Echoes End

Video.summary: Hunter and Molenski investigate a series of rape/murders that revive disturbing memories for Molenski.
Video.title: Kill Zone

Video.summary: Hunter and Molenski battle a neighborhood watch group whose members are taking the law into their own hands.
Video.title: The Incident

Video.summary: Molenski battles to protect the identity of an informant as Hunter investigates a boy's death.
Video.title: A Snitch'll Break Your Heart

Video.summary: When a mobster's son is killed, Devane must defend himself from charges of corruption.
Video.title: Oh, The Shark Bites!

Video.summary: Hunter attempts to find prisoners set free by a computer operator who wants one of them to kill her husband.
Video.title: The Usual Suspects

Video.summary: While investigating a series of art thefts, Molenski's gun is stolen and used in a fatal robbery.
Video.title: This Is My Gun

Video.summary: When a friend of Hunter's is released from prison, he struggles to keep his son from continuing gang activity.
Video.title: La Familia

Video.summary: Hunter clashes with an opportunistic lawyer when he arrests the wrong suspect.
Video.title: Acapulco Holiday

Video.summary: A former girlfriend complicates Hunter's investigation of a string of campus murders.
Video.title: Fatal Obsession, Part 1

Video.summary: A former girlfriend complicates Hunter's investigation of a string of campus murders.
Video.title: Fatal Obsession, Part 2

Video.summary: Hunter unwittingly helps a businessman find and kill a fleeing executive.
Video.title: Under Suspicion

Video.summary: Novak's old friend comes to Los Angeles to do a story on police work, but impedes an investigation.
Video.title: The Reporter

Video.summary: Old passions and jealousies flare when Hunter is forced to work with Chris Novak's ex-husband.
Video.title: Room Service

Video.summary: When Chris Novak's estranged father returns to her life, it's not to rekindle their relationship, but to kill.
Video.title: Shadows Of The Past

Video.summary: Chris' daughter is kidnapped to prevent her father from providing Hunter and Chris with vital information.
Video.title: The Grab

Video.summary: Hunter searches for the killer of several people while Novak is concerned with the arrest of a teenaged mugger
Video.title: All That Glitters

Video.summary: As Hunter investigates the murder of a foreign dignitary's assistant, Novak searches for a runaway teenager.
Video.title: Cries Of Silence

Video.summary: A series of cleaning store robberies exposes the chain's owner as the decoy for a money laundering conspiracy.
Video.title: Ex Marks The Spot

Video.summary: Devane becomes entangled in the life of an ex-convict who disappears shortly before his wedding.
Video.title: Little Man With A Big Reputation

Little Man With A Big Reputation
Little Man With A Big Reputation
Little Man With A Big Reputation
Little Man With A Big Reputation
Little Man With A Big Reputation
Little Man With A Big Reputation
Little Man With A Big Reputation
Little Man With A Big Reputation

Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
